assignments.label: Update Cancellation Date Time Is Now

rules.name: Yes_Cancel_Reminder_Appointment
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND 7 AND 8 AND 9 AND 10 AND (11 or 12) AND 13
rules.label: Yes- Cancel Reminder Appointment

rules.name: Yes_Canceled_Appointment_Email_Exp
rules.conditionLogic: 1 and 2 and 3 and (4 or 5) and 6 and 7 and 8 and 9 and 10 and (11 or 12 or 13 or 14) and 15 and 16 and 17 and 18

rightValue.stringValue: נציג לא קבע תור בצורה תקינה

rules.label: Yes- Canceled Appointment, Email (Exp)

rules.name: Yes_Canceled_Appointment_Email_inst
rules.conditionLogic: 1 and 2 and 3 and (4 or 5) and 6 and 7 and 8 and 9 and 10 and (11 or 12 or 13 or 14) and 15 and 16 and 17 and 18 and 19 and 20 and 21

rightValue.stringValue: נציג לא קבע תור בצורה תקינה

rules.label: Yes- Canceled Appointment, Email (inst)

rules.name: Yes_Canceled_Appointment_SMS_Ashdod
rules.conditionLogic: 1 and 2 and 3 and (4 or 5) and 6 and (7 and 20) and 8 and 9 and (10 or 11 or 12) and 13 and 14 and (15 or 16 or 17 or 18) and 19 and 21 and 22 and 23 and 24 and 25 and 26 and 27 and 28

rightValue.stringValue: נציג לא קבע תור בצורה תקינה

rules.label: Yes- Canceled Appointment SMS- Ashdod

rules.name: Yes_Canceled_Doctor_Appointment_SMS
rules.conditionLogic: 1 and 2 and 3 and (4 or 5) and 6 and (7 and 20) and 8 and 9 and (10 or 11 or 12) and 13 and 14 and (15 or 16 or 17 or 18) and 19 and 21 and 22 and 23 and 24

rightValue.stringValue: נציג לא קבע תור בצורה תקינה

rules.label: Yes- Canceled Doctor Appointment SMS

rules.name: Yes_Cancelled_Appointment_SMS
rules.conditionLogic: 26 and 1 and 2 and 3 and (4 or 5) and 6 and (7 and 20) and 8 and 9 and (10 or 11 or 12) and 13 and 14 and (15 or 16 or 17 or 18) and 19 and 21 and 22 and 23 and 24 and 25

rightValue.stringValue: נציג לא קבע תור בצורה תקינה

rules.label: Yes- Cancelled Appointment SMS

rules.name: Institutes
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND (5 OR 6) AND 7
rules.label: Institutes

rules.name: Experts
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND (5 OR 6) AND 7 AND 8
rules.label: Experts

decisions.label: Psychiatry Appointment Was Cancelled Before Payment?

rules.name: Yes_Send_Cancellation_Email_Aashdod
rules.conditionLogic: 1 and 2 and 3 and (4 or 5) and 6 and 7 and 8 and 9 and 10 and (11 or 12 or 13 or 14) and 15 and 16 and 17 and 18 and 19 and 20 and 21

rightValue.stringValue: נציג לא קבע תור בצורה תקינה

rules.label: Yes- Send Cancellation Email- Aashdod

decisions.name: Send_WA_Message_Cancel_Reminder_Institutes_All
decisions.label: Send WA Message? (Cancel Reminder Institutes All)

rules.name: Yes_Send_WA_Message_Cancel_Reminder_Institutes_All
rules.label: Yes- Send WA Message (Cancel Reminder Institutes All)

decisions.name: Send_WhatsApp_Or_SMS_cancel_reminder_ashdod
decisions.label: Send WhatsApp Or SMS? (cancel reminder ashdod)

decisions.name: Send_WhatsApp_Or_SMS_Canceled_Appointment_Ashdod
decisions.label: Send WhatsApp Or SMS? (Canceled Appointment Ashdod)

Flow.description: PB בשם "canceled appointment" שהומר לפלואו. שליחת אימייל או SMS במידה והתור בוטל והפעולה הרפואית אינה חסויה 26.2 - Added cancellation template for whatsapp 4.3 - Change on Decision "Credits" - replace code '5' to '60'. (שינוי מביטול המטופל לביטול המטופל + זיכוי) AM: 12032025- 1863719558 - REFACTOR AM: 18032025- 1863823235- Update conditions for sms sending AM: 04092025- 2117250555- replace sms sending to whatsapp sending for ashdod SP: 02032026 -2754086721- added new template cancel_appointment_emergency for institutes appointment AM: 26042026- 2665835522- עיניים - פגישה משולבת OCT - added subflow Auto_Check_Message_For_Medical_Procedure_Plan to check if WA message sould be sent for some templates. + remove appointment.after_save from decision
Flow.label: Cancelled Appointment PB to Flow

recordDeletes.description: Delete all SMS records that are related to this (triggered) appointment if filter conditions apply
recordDeletes.name: Delete_SMS_Records
recordDeletes.label: Delete SMS Records
